requirement_topic.en: Photobiological Safety — Blue Light Hazard (ABNT NBR IEC 62471 Risk Groups)
requirement_topic.zh: 光生物安全——蓝光危害（ABNT NBR IEC 62471 危险组别）
requirement_topic.zht: 光生物安全——藍光危害（ABNT NBR IEC 62471 危險組別）

summary.en: Photobiological safety of LED lamps and luminaires in Brazil is addressed through the INMETRO conformity assessment programme (Portaria INMETRO 389/2021 and related technical requirements), which references photobiological safety classification for in-scope products. The applicable technical method is ABNT NBR IEC 62471 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), the Brazilian adoption of IEC 62471, commonly used to derive the risk group. Risk groups range from RG0 (Exempt — no hazard) to RG3 (High risk), determined by blue light weighted radiance and irradiance limits. Where required by the applicable INMETRO technical requirements, the risk group must be assessed, documented in the certification dossier, and reflected in product marking/instructions for RG2 and above. The mandatory obligation derives from the INMETRO programme, not from the standard as a standalone legal rule.
summary.zh: 巴西 LED 灯及灯具的光生物安全通过 INMETRO 合格评定程序（Portaria INMETRO 389/2021 及相关技术要求）处理，其对适用产品引用光生物安全分类。适用技术方法为 ABNT NBR IEC 62471（灯和灯系统的光生物安全），即 IEC 62471 的巴西转化版本，通常用于得出危险组别。危险组别从 RG0（豁免——无危害）至 RG3（高危险），由蓝光加权辐亮度和辐照度限值决定。在适用 INMETRO 技术要求要求时，须评估危险组别、记录于认证档案中，并在 RG2 及以上的产品标志/说明中体现。强制性义务来自 INMETRO 程序，而非标准本身作为独立法律规则。
summary.zht: 巴西 LED 燈及燈具的光生物安全通過 INMETRO 合格評定程序（Portaria INMETRO 389/2021 及相關技術要求）處理，其對適用產品引用光生物安全分類。適用技術方法為 ABNT NBR IEC 62471（燈和燈系統的光生物安全），即 IEC 62471 的巴西轉化版本，通常用於得出危險組別。危險組別從 RG0（豁免——無危害）至 RG3（高危險），由藍光加權輻亮度和輻照度限值決定。在適用 INMETRO 技術要求要求時，須評估危險組別、記錄於認證檔案中，並在 RG2 及以上的產品標誌/說明中體現。強制性義務來自 INMETRO 程序，而非標準本身作為獨立法律規則。

standards_or_laws: Portaria INMETRO 389/2021 — Conformity assessment for LED lamps and luminaires (Brazil; references photobiological safety where applicable)
ABNT NBR IEC 62471 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (Brazilian adoption of IEC 62471)

summary.en: China has adopted GB/T 20145-2006 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), which is technically equivalent to IEC 62471:2006. GB/T 20145 is a recommended standard (T = tuijian, recommended) and is not universally mandatory for all LED luminaires in the Chinese market. Enforcement and testing obligations are less prescriptive for residential luminaires compared to a third-party certification programme.
summary.zh: 中国已采用 GB/T 20145-2006（灯和灯系统的光生物安全），技术上等同于 IEC 62471:2006。GB/T 20145 为推荐性标准（T = 推荐），并非对所有中国市场 LED 灯具均为强制要求。与第三方认证程序相比，中国对居民灯具的执行及检测义务规定不够严格。
summary.zht: 中國已採用 GB/T 20145-2006（燈和燈系統的光生物安全），技術上等同於 IEC 62471:2006。GB/T 20145 為推薦性標準（T = 推薦），並非對所有中國市場 LED 燈具均為強制要求。與第三方認證程序相比，中國對居民燈具的執行及檢測義務規定不夠嚴格。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20145-2006 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (SAC/SAMR — recommended standard)

gap.en: In Brazil, photobiological risk-group assessment is incorporated into the INMETRO conformity assessment programme for in-scope LED products and is performed/recognised through accredited testing, whereas China's GB/T 20145 is recommended-only and not routinely enforced for residential LED luminaires. Brazil-specific gaps: (1) the risk group must be derived using ABNT NBR IEC 62471 and documented in the INMETRO certification dossier where required by the applicable technical requirements; (2) Chinese GB/T 20145 reports are not accepted by INMETRO — assessment must be via the Brazilian route at an accredited laboratory; (3) RG2 products require warnings/usage instructions and RG3 products face significant market restrictions; (4) the obligation and documentation are held by the CNPJ importer/representative within the INMETRO programme. Most general-purpose luminaires targeting RG0/RG1 have no usage restrictions, but the classification must still be formally documented where the INMETRO technical requirements call for it.
gap.zh: 在巴西，光生物危险组别评估纳入面向适用 LED 产品的 INMETRO 合格评定程序，并通过认可检测开展/认可，而中国 GB/T 20145 仅为推荐性标准，对居民 LED 灯具的日常执行力度有限。巴西特有差距：（1）危险组别须采用 ABNT NBR IEC 62471 得出，并在适用技术要求要求时记录于 INMETRO 认证档案中；（2）中国 GB/T 20145 报告不被 INMETRO 接受——评估须经巴西路径在认可实验室进行；（3）RG2 产品须附带警告/使用说明，RG3 产品面临重大市场限制；（4）义务及文件由 INMETRO 程序内的 CNPJ 进口商/代表持有。大多数面向 RG0/RG1 的通用灯具无使用限制，但在 INMETRO 技术要求要求时分类仍须正式记录。
gap.zht: 在巴西，光生物危險組別評估納入面向適用 LED 產品的 INMETRO 合格評定程序，並通過認可檢測開展/認可，而中國 GB/T 20145 僅為推薦性標準，對居民 LED 燈具的日常執行力度有限。巴西特有差距：（1）危險組別須採用 ABNT NBR IEC 62471 得出，並在適用技術要求要求時記錄於 INMETRO 認證檔案中；（2）中國 GB/T 20145 報告不被 INMETRO 接受——評估須經巴西路徑在認可實驗室進行；（3）RG2 產品須附帶警告/使用說明，RG3 產品面臨重大市場限制；（4）義務及文件由 INMETRO 程序內的 CNPJ 進口商/代表持有。大多數面向 RG0/RG1 的通用燈具無使用限制，但在 INMETRO 技術要求要求時分類仍須正式記錄。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where applicable — photobiological risk group assessment using ABNT NBR IEC 62471 is incorporated into the INMETRO conformity assessment programme for in-scope LED products; documentation held within the INMETRO dossier
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended — GB/T 20145-2006 is a recommended (non-mandatory) standard; enforcement for residential luminaires is not universally prescribed

source.publisher: INMETRO — Instituto Nacional de Metrologia, Qualidade e Tecnologia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Photobiological risk-group classification for in-scope LED products in Brazil is incorporated into the INMETRO conformity assessment programme, with ABNT NBR IEC 62471 as the referenced technical method. Chinese GB/T 20145-2006 reports are not accepted by INMETRO and the assessment must run through the Brazilian accredited route. RG2/RG3 products require additional warnings/restrictions. The standard is the technical route; the mandatory obligation derives from the INMETRO programme, and the documentation sits with the CNPJ importer/representative.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴西适用 LED 产品的光生物危险组别分类纳入 INMETRO 合格评定程序，以 ABNT NBR IEC 62471 作为引用技术方法。中国 GB/T 20145-2006 报告不被 INMETRO 接受，评估须经巴西认可路径进行。RG2/RG3 产品须附加警告/限制。标准为技术路径；强制性义务来自 INMETRO 程序，文件由 CNPJ 进口商/代表持有。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴西適用 LED 產品的光生物危險組別分類納入 INMETRO 合格評定程序，以 ABNT NBR IEC 62471 作為引用技術方法。中國 GB/T 20145-2006 報告不被 INMETRO 接受，評估須經巴西認可路徑進行。RG2/RG3 產品須附加警告/限制。標準為技術路徑；強制性義務來自 INMETRO 程序，文件由 CNPJ 進口商/代表持有。

requirement_topic.en: Photobiological Safety Marking on Brazilian Product Information (INMETRO)
requirement_topic.zh: 巴西产品信息上的光生物安全标识（INMETRO）
requirement_topic.zht: 巴西產品信息上的光生物安全標識（INMETRO）

summary.en: Where the applicable INMETRO technical requirements call for photobiological risk-group declaration, the assessed risk group (commonly derived via ABNT NBR IEC 62471) must be reflected in the product information, marking, and/or instructions placed on the Brazilian market — particularly for products classified RG2 or above, which require appropriate warnings and usage guidance. Unlike the EU's dedicated blue light hazard class on the energy label, Brazil does not impose a separate blue-light-class energy-label field for general lamps; the photobiological information is instead handled within the INMETRO certification dossier and product marking/instructions per the applicable Portaria. The information obligation attaches to the in-scope product and is held by the CNPJ importer/representative responsible before INMETRO.
summary.zh: 在适用 INMETRO 技术要求要求进行光生物危险组别声明时，所评估的危险组别（通常通过 ABNT NBR IEC 62471 得出）须在投放巴西市场的产品信息、标志和/或说明中体现——尤其是分类为 RG2 及以上的产品，须附带适当的警告及使用指引。与欧盟在能效标签上设置专门蓝光危害等级不同，巴西未对普通灯具设置独立的蓝光等级能效标签栏位；光生物信息改由 INMETRO 认证档案及按适用 Portaria 的产品标志/说明处理。该信息义务附属于适用产品，由在 INMETRO 面前负责的 CNPJ 进口商/代表持有。
summary.zht: 在適用 INMETRO 技術要求要求進行光生物危險組別聲明時，所評估的危險組別（通常通過 ABNT NBR IEC 62471 得出）須在投放巴西市場的產品信息、標誌和/或說明中體現——尤其是分類為 RG2 及以上的產品，須附帶適當的警告及使用指引。與歐盟在能效標籤上設置專門藍光危害等級不同，巴西未對普通燈具設置獨立的藍光等級能效標籤欄位；光生物信息改由 INMETRO 認證檔案及按適用 Portaria 的產品標誌/說明處理。該信息義務附屬於適用產品，由在 INMETRO 面前負責的 CNPJ 進口商/代表持有。

standards_or_laws: Portaria INMETRO 389/2021 — Conformity assessment for LED lamps and luminaires (product marking/instructions requirements, Brazil)
ABNT NBR IEC 62471 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (risk-group basis for marking/warnings)

summary.en: China's Energy Label (China Energy Label, CEL) mandatory under GB 30255 (LED room luminaires energy efficiency) does not include a blue light hazard or photobiological risk-group class. The Chinese labelling regime focuses on energy efficiency grades (Grade 1–3) and lumen output. There is no CN regulatory requirement to display photobiological risk group information on luminaire packaging equivalent to the Brazilian INMETRO marking/instructions requirement.
summary.zh: 中国依据 GB 30255（LED 室内照明产品能效要求）强制推行的中国能效标识（CEL）不包含蓝光危害或光生物危险组别等级。中国标签制度侧重能效等级（1–3 级）及光通量输出，无相当于巴西 INMETRO 标志/说明要求的规定要求在灯具包装上显示光生物危险组别信息。
summary.zht: 中國依據 GB 30255（LED 室內照明產品能效要求）強制推行的中國能效標識（CEL）不包含藍光危害或光生物危險組別等級。中國標籤制度側重能效等級（1–3 級）及光通量輸出，無相當於巴西 INMETRO 標誌/說明要求的規定要求在燈具包裝上顯示光生物危險組別信息。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR — no photobiological risk-group requirement)

gap.en: There is no CN counterpart to a photobiological risk-group marking/warning requirement — Chinese manufacturers producing to CN specifications will not carry such information on their standard CN-market packaging. For Brazil, where the applicable INMETRO technical requirements call for it: (1) document a photobiological risk assessment using ABNT NBR IEC 62471; (2) include the appropriate risk-group warnings/usage guidance in product marking and instructions for RG2 and above; (3) ensure consistency with the INMETRO certification dossier and the in-country CNPJ representative's responsibilities. Note the structural difference from the EU: Brazil does not add a dedicated blue-light class field to the energy label for general lamps, so the obligation is met through INMETRO product marking/instructions and certification documentation rather than an energy-label field.
gap.zh: 中国无对应光生物危险组别标志/警告要求——按中国规格生产的制造商在其标准中国市场包装上不会附有此类信息。对于巴西，在适用 INMETRO 技术要求要求时：（1）采用 ABNT NBR IEC 62471 记录光生物危险评估；（2）在 RG2 及以上产品的标志和说明中纳入适当的危险组别警告/使用指引；（3）确保与 INMETRO 认证档案及在地 CNPJ 代表的职责保持一致。注意与欧盟的结构差异：巴西未对普通灯具在能效标签上增设专门蓝光等级栏位，因此该义务通过 INMETRO 产品标志/说明及认证文件履行，而非能效标签栏位。
gap.zht: 中國無對應光生物危險組別標誌/警告要求——按中國規格生產的製造商在其標準中國市場包裝上不會附有此類信息。對於巴西，在適用 INMETRO 技術要求要求時：（1）採用 ABNT NBR IEC 62471 記錄光生物危險評估；（2）在 RG2 及以上產品的標誌和說明中納入適當的危險組別警告/使用指引；（3）確保與 INMETRO 認證檔案及在地 CNPJ 代表的職責保持一致。注意與歐盟的結構差異：巴西未對普通燈具在能效標籤上增設專門藍光等級欄位，因此該義務通過 INMETRO 產品標誌/說明及認證文件履行，而非能效標籤欄位。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where applicable — photobiological risk-group declaration/warnings in product marking and instructions required under the applicable Portaria INMETRO 389/2021 technical requirements, particularly for RG2 and above
mandatory_status.cn: Not required — China Energy Label (GB 30255) does not include a photobiological risk-group or blue light hazard class

source.publisher: INMETRO — Instituto Nacional de Metrologia, Qualidade e Tecnologia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Where the applicable INMETRO technical requirements call for it, the photobiological risk group (derived via ABNT NBR IEC 62471) must be reflected in Brazilian product marking, instructions, and the certification dossier, with warnings for RG2 and above. Unlike the EU, Brazil does not add a separate blue-light class to the energy label for general lamps. The Chinese CEL has no photobiological class, so this is an additional Brazil-specific documentation/marking step held by the CNPJ importer/representative.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在适用 INMETRO 技术要求要求时，光生物危险组别（通过 ABNT NBR IEC 62471 得出）须在巴西产品标志、说明及认证档案中体现，并对 RG2 及以上附加警告。与欧盟不同，巴西未对普通灯具在能效标签上增设独立蓝光等级。中国 CEL 无光生物等级，因此这是由 CNPJ 进口商/代表持有的额外巴西特有文件/标志步骤。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在適用 INMETRO 技術要求要求時，光生物危險組別（通過 ABNT NBR IEC 62471 得出）須在巴西產品標誌、說明及認證檔案中體現，並對 RG2 及以上附加警告。與歐盟不同，巴西未對普通燈具在能效標籤上增設獨立藍光等級。中國 CEL 無光生物等級，因此這是由 CNPJ 進口商/代表持有的額外巴西特有文件/標誌步驟。
